name: Adam B.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

Very helpful staff. Easy to work with product. They keep adding things to the service that makes the product even better.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

Nothing to really dislike, they solve issues quickly. They have continued to add to their product so it's hard not to like the product when it keeps getting better.

‍

Recommendations to others considering Synup:

Just try it out.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Review Generation platform is great. I have increased my SEO ranking and love having all of my reviews put into one place so that I can respond quickly to them.
